commands.command: python -m py_compile <selected M0/M1/M2/M2.5 modules and scripts>
commands.name: py_compile_backbone_modules_and_scripts

commands.command: conda run --no-capture-output -n omicverse python -m pytest -q tests/test_config.py tests/test_verify_raw_files.py tests/test_graph.py tests/test_spatial.py tests/test_metadata.py tests/test_niche.py tests/test_niche_qc.py tests/test_m2_representation.py tests/test_m2_full_runner.py tests/test_planA_k_metaniche_pilot.py tests/test_planA_k_metaniche_hardening.py tests/test_planA_k_full_m2_5_production.py tests/test_planA_k_production_preflight.py
commands.name: pytest_backbone_subset
